span.p: discoverCandidateSources()

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Resolve caps
profileMaxQueries = max(6, discoveryMaxQueries * 2)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
buildSearchProfile()
job + categoryConfig + missingFields + learnedQueries + brandResolution

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Resolve identity
base_templates = searchTemplates
focus_fields = normalize(missingFields by fieldOrder)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
buildDeterministicAliases(aliasValidationCap)
variant_guard_terms

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
buildQueryRows()
search_hints.query_terms
domain_hints
preferred_content_types
tooltip gate
learned queries

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Select queries
base_templates first
round-robin rows
dedup
cap to maxQueries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Return 17-key Search Profile
queries
query_rows
targeted_queries
field/doc maps

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
searchDiscovery extracts
baseQueries = base_templates
targetedQueries = queries
profileQueryRowsByQuery metadata map

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
planDiscoveryQueriesLLM()
baseQueries: [...baseQueries, ...targetedQueries]
missingCriticalFields

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Gate: llmEnabled && llmPlanDiscoveryQueries && plan-role API key

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Payload
product
criticalFields
missingCriticalFields
existingQueries = filterRelevantQueries(...).slice(0,20)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Standard mode: primary pass only
Aggressive mode: fast + reason + validate passes

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
callLlmWithRouting()
role=plan
reasoningMode = pass.reasoningMode OR llmReasoningMode
timeout = llmTimeoutMs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Normalize + dedupe + cap
standard: max(8, discoveryMaxQueries)
aggressive: max(12, aggressiveLlmDiscoveryQueryCap)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: llmQueries returned to searchDiscovery

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Uber planner only when mode = uber_aggressive
baseQueries = base_templates + queries + llmQueries

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
planUberQueries()
source = llm | deterministic | deterministic_fallback

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Merge back into query candidates
base_template + targeted + llm + uber + runtime_extra

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
dedupeQueryRows() -> prioritizeQueryRows()
post-planner cap usually falls back to discoveryMaxQueries
